series_metadata.series_description: Files maintained on temporary employees that contain required documentation and agreements with OOD. The documents may include: Confidentiality Agreements, Contracts, Timesheets and other necessary documentation.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: records three (3) state fiscal years from last date work or services were performed. A Certificate of Disposal is required when destroying this record. ; Electronic: records three (3) state fiscal years from last date work or services were performed. A Certificate of Disposal is required when destroying this record
